name: Otis Worldwide Corporation
description: Otis Worldwide Corporation is a leading global manufacturer and maintainer of elevators, escalators, and moving walkways. With a history spanning over 160 years, the company is dedicated to connecting people and places by reinventing how passengers move through the urban world. Headquartered in the United States, Otis provides industry-leading equipment, modernization tools, and comprehensive service packages for buildings worldwide. The company focuses on innovation and reliability, ensuring safe and efficient vertical transportation solutions for a diverse range of residential, commercial, and infrastructure projects across the globe.
